gauntletci_promise: Diff-scoped review of a changeset (staged commit or pull request)
Behavioral and logic regression risk, not style-only or whole-repo hygiene
Line-anchored findings with stable rule identifiers
Deterministic output: same diff and config produce the same rule firings
Pre-commit or PR gate with bounded delivery noise on large diffs

inclusion_criteria.must_claim: Pull request or diff review for bugs, regressions, or behavioral risk
inclusion_criteria.must_be_free: Free tier for public OSS repos, free PR bot, or free local CLI usable in the benchmark workflow
inclusion_criteria.must_be_measurable_or_planned: Anchor harvest, GitHub API, SARIF, or documented replay on eval/diffs patches

anchor_only.description: Eval-lab mirror PR with harvested competitor comments

gold_cross_repo.description: Automated same-defect recall on ci_required adjudicated defects across expanded gold tier

comparable_tools.name: CodeQL
comparable_tools.free_tier: GitHub code scanning on public repositories

comparable_tools.name: SonarCloud
comparable_tools.free_tier: Free for public projects on SonarCloud

comparable_tools.name: GitHub Copilot Review
comparable_tools.free_tier: GitHub Copilot plan includes PR review on supported repos

comparable_tools.name: Claude Code Review
comparable_tools.free_tier: Vendor-dependent; not in harness until a reproducible OSS harvest exists

comparable_tools.name: Cursor BugBot
comparable_tools.free_tier: Product-dependent; not in harness until a reproducible OSS harvest exists

adjacent_not_comparable.name: Amazon CodeGuru
adjacent_not_comparable.reason: Paid AWS service; not a free diff-review peer

adjacent_not_comparable.name: Atlassian Rovo
adjacent_not_comparable.reason: Work management assistant, not a PR behavioral gauntlet

adjacent_not_comparable.name: Bito
adjacent_not_comparable.reason: No free reproducible PR harvest in benchmark

adjacent_not_comparable.name: Codacy
adjacent_not_comparable.reason: Repo quality and coverage emphasis, not adjudicated logic defects on diff

adjacent_not_comparable.name: CodeScene
adjacent_not_comparable.reason: Code health and evolution metrics, not PR gate on logic drift

adjacent_not_comparable.name: DeepSource
adjacent_not_comparable.reason: Static quality platform, different promise than diff behavioral risk

adjacent_not_comparable.name: GitLab Duo
adjacent_not_comparable.reason: GitLab suite AI, not a free standalone diff gauntlet

adjacent_not_comparable.name: Graphite Agent
adjacent_not_comparable.reason: No free reproducible PR harvest in benchmark

adjacent_not_comparable.name: Manus
adjacent_not_comparable.reason: General agent, not a pre-commit diff reviewer

adjacent_not_comparable.name: Repowise
adjacent_not_comparable.reason: No free reproducible PR harvest in benchmark

adjacent_not_comparable.name: SonarQube
adjacent_not_comparable.reason: Self-hosted quality server; compare via SonarCloud in gold harness

adjacent_not_comparable.name: Sourcery
adjacent_not_comparable.reason: Refactoring and style, not behavioral defect detection
